description: An online retail business needs to calculate and prepare its quarterly state sales tax return.

nodes.task_description: Import the total sales data for the quarter.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully imports sales transaction data.

nodes.task_description: Separate sales by jurisdiction and distinguish between taxable and non-taxable sales.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly segregates sales based on location and taxability.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total sales tax due for each jurisdiction and prepare the state sales tax return for filing.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately calculates the tax owed and prepares the final return.
